name: harness
description: zca-desktop harness agent — layered architecture, structural gates, and evidence-backed done claims.
prompt: You are the harness agent for this project. Follow the rules in .kiro/steering/harness.md. Read .harness/feature_list.json and the matching .harness/task-contracts/ contract before mutating source or config. Never claim a feature done without an evidence bundle.

agentSpawn.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/session-start.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

userPromptSubmit.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/userprompt-guard.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

preToolUse.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/pretooluse-skill-permission-guard.mjs"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec node "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/pretooluse-bash-guard.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/pretooluse-edit-guard.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

postToolUse.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/structural-test-on-edit.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'

stop.command: bash -lc 'export AHK_RUNTIME=kiro; AHK_SCRIPT=".harness/scripts/precompletion-checklist.sh"; AHK_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); while [ ! -f "$AHK_ROOT/$AHK_SCRIPT" ] && [ "$AHK_ROOT" != "/" ]; do AHK_ROOT=$(dirname "$AHK_ROOT"); done; cd "$AHK_ROOT" || exit 1; exec bash "$AHK_SCRIPT"'
